name: PULMONARY INFARCTION
definition: ischemic coagulative necrosis of lung parenchyma

demographics.Frequency: rare due to protective effect of collateral blood flow from bronchial circulation
demographics.Path: dark necrotic material (with faint ghostlike structures of lung tissue remaining evident on

clinical.Prognosis: replacement by vascular fibrous tissue folding into a collagenous platelike mass →
